creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/devel/electron22/>

As far as I can tell: not a typo, <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/devel/electron22/distinfo?id=6a6b89a12fa6f0d2d6ee2a43c51db01a74c69b4f> was for 22.0.1 i.e. <https://github.com/electron/electron/releases/tag/v22.0.1>. 

For future updates, portscout should take care of notifications.

<https://portscout.freebsd.org/mikael@freebsd.org.html>
